name: contextify
description: Contextify — persistent context engine for AI coding assistants: screenshot compression + a live Software Knowledge Graph of your codebase.

plugins.name: contextify
plugins.description: Persistent context engine — an eye and a memory for your AI. 16 tools: Screenshot Blueprint eye-loop (screenshot → wireframe → mapped to the code that implements it → design variants), live Software Knowledge Graph (React/Next.js + Flutter, incremental), flow tracing, what-if simulation, visual Mermaid explanations, impact analysis + regression risk, architecture score, feature graph, temporal timeline, and an on-demand token-savings report. Interactive visualization + CLI. 100% local.
